rss.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
rss.snippet: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

arxiv_papers.title: Hyper-learning and Unlearning: A Narrative Speculation on Urbanism in Media Ecologies
arxiv_papers.snippet: Hyper-learning and Unlearning is a speculative animation that reflect how learning is reconfigured within digital media ecologies. podcast: [The U.S. Public Wants Regulation (or Prohibition) of Expert‑Level and Superhuman AI] Three‑quarters of U.S. adults want strong regulations on AI development, preferring oversight akin to pharmaceuticals rather than industry "self‑regulation."
